summary: Plan-only classification for the hydrated cluster. #89584 is quarantined as the job-designated security-signal ref; unrelated non-security items split into three independent memory-core subclusters: supplement candidate passthrough (#82984/#82985), QMD no-rerank for search/vsearch (#88887), and QMD zero-hit forced-sync stall (#90023/#90030/#90117). No GitHub mutations are planned.
